title: prunus occultipes
intro: Prunus occultipes, also known as the Yunnan cherry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family native to southwestern China. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Prunus occultipes include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and promoting digestion. Prunus occultipes can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make medicinal wines and decoctions.
